overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077, beginning with exploration of a dimly lit apartment interior overlooking a sunny outdoor market, then transitioning to a neon-soaked cyberpunk city street at night. The player character walks through urban environments, crosses streets, and enters an industrial building via an illuminated staircase.

scene_state.functional_zone: compact residential apartment with workspace and sleeping area

events.description: camera approaches window revealing bright daylight outside, creating high contrast with dark interior

agents.ego_description: slowly panning around the small apartment, examining the desk area, wardrobe, and looking out the window at the outdoor market

entered.detail: cluttered workspace with lamp and papers
black ergonomic chair on wheels
tall brown cabinet with double doors
green and yellow rolling tool chest
large round rug with abstract brown pattern
large window with horizontal blinds showing sunny exterior
bed with white sheets against the wall
shelves with books and items above the bed

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person exploration of a dimly lit, compact apartment. The camera pans slowly around the room, revealing a wooden desk with a lamp, a wardrobe, a green tool cabinet, and a circular rug. The player approaches a window with blinds, revealing a bright, sunny outdoor market area with white tents, creating a stark contrast with the dark interior. The bed area and wall shelves are visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk downtown street with neon signage and overhead highway structures

events.description: abrupt transition from apartment interior to night city street, camera looks up at massive overhead structure
camera descends from looking upward to street level and begins walking forward along the sidewalk
crossing yellow-striped pedestrian crosswalk on the wet street

agents.ego_description: walking along the cyberpunk city street, crossing roads and approaching a large staircase entrance

notable_agents.action: person standing near the stairs entrance wearing casual clothing

entered.detail: massive concrete and metal overpass blocking the sky
tall vertical sign with illuminated letters
modern street light with multiple fixtures
yellow painted stripes on the asphalt road
large concrete planter with palm tree
wide staircase with illuminated edges leading upward
large screen displaying advertisements with neon colors

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions abruptly from the apartment to a dark cyberpunk city street at night. The camera looks up at a massive overhead highway structure before descending to street level. The player walks along wet asphalt roads with yellow crosswalk stripes, passing palm tree planters and neon signs. The environment features tall buildings with digital billboards and a sparse crowd of pedestrians. The player approaches a wide staircase entrance with illuminated edges.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial building interior with illuminated staircase and Japanese signage

events.description: entering building from street level, beginning ascent of illuminated concrete staircase
interior space filled with atmospheric smoke and colored neon lighting creating hazy atmosphere

agents.ego_description: walking up the illuminated staircase and entering a smoky industrial interior with various stalls and machinery

notable_agents.action: person descending the stairs in the opposite direction

entered.detail: illuminated signs with Japanese characters above the entrance
red and white automated vending machine
large mechanical equipment with pipes and vents
thick fog or smoke filling the corridor
grated metal walkway overhead with railings
large industrial roll-up doors in the background

segments.scene_description: The player ascends the illuminated concrete staircase into an industrial building interior. Neon Japanese signage marks the entrance above. Inside, the space is filled with atmospheric smoke and bathed in colored neon light. The environment features industrial machinery, a vending machine, metal catwalks overhead, and garage doors in the background. Other pedestrians are seen moving through the hazy corridor as the player explores the interior space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey that transforms from a secluded, dimly lit apartment into a sprawling, neon-drenched industrial cityscape. It begins with a slow pan through a compact room featuring a wooden desk and tool cabinet, moving toward a window where the dark interior contrasts sharply with a bright, sunny outdoor market. The scene then shifts abruptly to a rain-slicked city street at night, where the camera looks up at a massive overhead highway before descending to navigate wet asphalt and glowing digital billboards. As the player moves past palm tree planters and pedestrians, the perspective turns toward a wide staircase with illuminated edges. Finally, the camera ascends these stairs and enters a hazy industrial building, moving through atmospheric smoke and colored neon light past metal catwalks and heavy machinery.
